library.name: Avalon
library.description: This is a game of hidden loyalty. Players are either Good Loyal Servants of Arthur fighting for goodness and honor, or they are aligned with the Evil ways of Mordred. Players vote to choose who will go on which Quest, but how can they know who to trust? If Evil sabotages three Quests, or if they assassinate Merlin at the end of the game, Arthur’s kingdom will fall.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR: Este é um jogo de lealdade oculta. Os jogadores são servos leais e bondosos de Arthur, lutando pela bondade e honra, ou estão alinhados com os caminhos malignos de Mordred. Os jogadores votam para escolher quem irá em qual missão, mas como saber em quem confiar? Se o mal sabotar três missões, ou se assassinar Merlin no final do jogo, o reino de Arthur cairá.

library.name: Betrayal at House on the Hill
library.description:
Betrayal at House on the Hill quickly builds suspense and excitement as players explore a haunted mansion of their own design, encountering spirits and frightening omens that foretell their fate. With an estimated one hour playing time, Betrayal at House on the Hill is ideal for parties, family gatherings or casual fun with friends.
Its a tile game that allows players to lay out the haunted house room by room, tile by tile, creating a new thrilling game board every time.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR:
Betrayal at House on the Hill cria rapidamente suspense e emoção enquanto os jogadores exploram uma mansão assombrada de sua própria criação, encontrando espíritos e presságios assustadores que prenunciam seu destino. Com uma duração estimada de uma hora, Betrayal at House on the Hill é ideal para festas, reuniões familiares ou diversão casual com amigos.
É um jogo de peças que permite aos jogadores montar a casa assombrada cômodo por cômodo, peça por peça, criando um novo tabuleiro emocionante.

library.name: Brass Birmingham
library.description:
Brass: Birmingham is an economic strategy game sequel to Martin Wallaces 2007 masterpiece, Brass. Brass: Birmingham tells the story of competing entrepreneurs in Birmingham during the industrial revolution between the years of 1770 and 1870.

It offers a very different story arc and experience from its predecessor. As in its predecessor, you must develop, build and establish your industries and network in an effort to exploit low or high market demands.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR:
Brass: Birmingham é um jogo de estratégia econômica, sequência da obra-prima de Martin Wallace de 2007, Brass. Brass: Birmingham conta a história de empreendedores rivais em Birmingham durante a Revolução Industrial, entre os anos de 1770 e 1870.
O jogo oferece uma narrativa e experiência muito diferentes de seu antecessor. Assim como em Brass, você deve desenvolver, construir e estabelecer suas indústrias e sua rede de contatos, buscando explorar as demandas de mercado, sejam altas ou baixas.

library.name: Breaking Bad
library.description: In Breaking Bad: The Board Game, players join criminal factions or the DEA in a battle for control of Albuquerque’s drug trade. Criminals produce and sell Blue Sky or eliminate rivals, while the DEA raids labs and arrests or takes down opponents. Each turn, players take actions like drawing cards, playing abilities, producing, or selling to achieve victory.

library.name: Dune: Imperium
library.description: In Dune: Imperium, players lead Great Houses using deck-building and worker placement. Cards determine where agents can act, shaping strategy across warfare and political influence with factions like the Emperor and Fremen. Each round, players place agents or reveal cards to gain resources and compete in conflicts. Balance strategy and power to secure victory on Arrakis.

library.name: Fallout
library.description: In Fallout, 1–4 players explore a post-nuclear wasteland inspired by the video game series. Each survivor uncovers the map, battles enemies, completes quests, and develops skills while navigating rival factions. Gaining influence is key, but if one faction rises too quickly, it can dominate the wasteland and determine the outcome for all players.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR: Em Fallout, de 1 a 4 jogadores exploram um mundo pós-apocalíptico inspirado na série de videogames. Cada sobrevivente descobre o mapa, enfrenta inimigos, completa missões e desenvolve habilidades enquanto lida com facções rivais. Ganhar influência é fundamental, mas se uma facção ascender muito rápido, ela pode dominar o mundo e determinar o destino de todos os jogadores.

library.name: River Dragons
library.description: In River Dragons, players race to cross a river using planks and foundations, but everyone acts independently, creating chaos. Each round, players secretly choose and order five action cards, then resolve them step by step—placing planks, moving, or disrupting others. The constantly changing board and simultaneous actions make for a tactical and unpredictable experience.

library.name: Sky Team
library.description:
Sky Team is a co-operative game, exclusively for two players, in which you play a pilot and co-pilot at the controls of an airliner. Your goal is to work together as a team to land your airplane in different airports around the world.
If the aircraft tilts too much and stalls, overshoots the airport, or collides with another aircraft, you lose the game...and your pilots license...and probably your life.
From Montreal to Tokyo, each airport offers its own set of challenges and turbulence.

library.name: Terraforming Mars
library.description: In Terraforming Mars, players control corporations working to make Mars habitable by raising temperature, oxygen, and oceans. Using project cards, they build engines, gain resources, and expand infrastructure. While contributing to terraforming together, players compete for victory points through strategy, production, and long-term planning.

library.name: Ticket to Ride
library.description: In Ticket to Ride, players collect train cards to claim routes across North America. Longer routes score more points, and completing destination tickets adds bonuses. Each turn, choose to draw cards, claim routes, or take new tickets. The strategy lies in balancing expansion with the risk of losing key routes to opponents.

library.name: Western Legends
library.description: In Western Legends, 2–6 players explore an open-world Wild West, taking on roles of historical figures. Earn Legendary Points by choosing your path—gamble, mine gold, rob banks, fight, or uphold the law. Each turn, players gain resources and take actions like moving, dueling, or using abilities, creating a dynamic sandbox experience with multiple ways to win.

library.name: Whistle Mountain
library.description: In Whistle Mountain, players invest profits from railroads into new technologies in the Rocky Mountains. Using worker placement, they build scaffolds and machines, gather resources, and upgrade abilities. Rising water adds tension, threatening workers as the board evolves. Each game changes based on player builds, creating dynamic strategies and high replayability.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR: Em Whistle Mountain, os jogadores investem os lucros das ferrovias em novas tecnologias nas Montanhas Rochosas. Usando o sistema de alocação de trabalhadores, eles constroem andaimes e máquinas, coletam recursos e aprimoram habilidades. A subida das águas adiciona tensão, ameaçando os trabalhadores à medida que o tabuleiro evolui. Cada partida muda com base nas construções dos jogadores, criando estratégias dinâmicas e alta rejogabilidade.

library.name: Zombicide: Army of the Dead
library.description:
Army of the Dead: A Zombicide Game is a standalone game in the Zombicide franchise based on the 2021 movie Army of the Dead directed by Zach Snyder.

In this tabletop adaptation, players must work together in order to survive the wasteland of Las Vegas and get into the casinos vault to score tons of cash. Along the way, theyll face all-new types of zombies, including Shamblers, Alphas, the Queen, Zeus, and even Valentine, the Zombie Tiger. Players can also attempt side-quests.

library.name: Zombicide: Black Plague
library.description: In Zombicide: Black Plague, players take on the role of medieval survivors battling a zombie invasion unleashed by necromancers. Using weapons, armor, and magic, they fight hordes, complete missions, and hunt necromancers to stop the spread. With updated rules and fast-paced gameplay, it delivers intense, cooperative action in a fantasy setting.

descriptionLocal.pt-BR: Em Zombicide: Black Plague, os jogadores assumem o papel de sobreviventes medievais lutando contra uma invasão zumbi desencadeada por necromantes. Usando armas, armaduras e magia, eles combatem hordas, completam missões e caçam necromantes para impedir a propagação. Com regras atualizadas e jogabilidade dinâmica, o jogo oferece ação cooperativa intensa em um cenário de fantasia.
